args.query:
WITH cases AS (
  SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
),
hist_owner AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id, oldvalue__c AS old_owner, newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT ho.*
  FROM hist_owner ho
  JOIN cases c ON ho.case_id = c.id
  WHERE ho.old_owner IS NOT NULL AND ho.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND ho.old_owner <> ho.new_owner
),
agents_handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ownerid AS agent_id FROM "Case" WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cases) AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM hist_owner WHERE case_id IN (SELECT id FROM cases) AND old_owner IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM hist_owner WHERE case_id IN (SELECT id FROM cases) AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
agents_stats AS (
  SELECT a.agent_id,
  COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM agents_handled a
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON a.agent_id = tc.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id FROM agents_stats WHERE transfer_count = (SELECT MIN(transfer_count) FROM agents_stats) LIMIT 1;

WITH cases AS (
  SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
),
hist_owner AS (

  WHERE ho.old_owner IS NOT NULL AND ho.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND ho.old_owner <> ho.new_owner

agents_handled AS (
